mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: Tool Listener: Create Record
mcp:tool-listener.name: salesforce-create-record
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Creates a new record in Salesforce. Use this tool when the user wants to CREATE, ADD, or INSERT a new record. Supported object types: Lead, Contact, Account, Opportunity, Case, and any custom SObject. The fields parameter must contain valid Salesforce field API names and values. For Lead: required fields are LastName and Company. For Contact: required field is LastName. For Account: required field is Name. For Opportunity: required fields are Name, StageName, and CloseDate.

mcp:text-tool-response-content.text: Error creating Salesforce record. Please check your input parameters and try again.

mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: Tool Listener: Query Records
mcp:tool-listener.name: salesforce-query-records
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Queries Salesforce records using a SOQL query. Use this tool when the user wants to SEARCH, FIND, LIST, COUNT, or RETRIEVE existing records from Salesforce. Build a valid SOQL query using SELECT, FROM, and optionally WHERE, ORDER BY, and LIMIT clauses. SOQL examples: - SELECT Id, Name, Email FROM Lead WHERE Company = 'Acme Corp' - SELECT Id, Name, StageName, Amount FROM Opportunity WHERE StageName != 'Closed Lost' ORDER BY Amount DESC LIMIT 10 - SELECT COUNT() FROM Case WHERE Status = 'Open' - SELECT Id, Name FROM Account WHERE CreatedDate = THIS_MONTH

mcp:text-tool-response-content.text: Error querying Salesforce. Please check your SOQL syntax and try again.

mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: Tool Listener: Update Record
mcp:tool-listener.name: salesforce-update-record
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Updates an existing Salesforce record using the record's Id. Use this tool when the user wants to MODIFY, CHANGE, EDIT, or UPDATE fields on an existing record and the Salesforce record Id is known. The fields parameter MUST include the Salesforce record 'Id' field (18-character ID). Only the fields provided will be updated; other fields remain unchanged. Supported object types: Lead, Contact, Account, Opportunity, Case, and any custom SObject. Example fields: {"Id": "00Q000000000001AAA", "Status": "Working", "Rating": "Hot"}

mcp:text-tool-response-content.text: Error updating Salesforce record. Please check the record ID and field values.

mcp:tool-listener.doc:name: Tool Listener: Upsert Record
mcp:tool-listener.name: salesforce-upsert-record
mcp:tool-listener.mcp:description: Upserts a Salesforce record — creates it if it does not exist, or updates it if it does, matching on an external ID field. Use this tool when: - The user wants to UPSERT using an external identifier (not the Salesforce Id) - You need to sync data from an external system using an external ID field - The record may or may not already exist in Salesforce The externalidfieldname is the API name of the custom external ID field on the SObject (e.g. External_ID__c). The fields parameter must include the external ID field value to match on, plus all other fields to set. Supported object types: Lead, Contact, Account, Opportunity, Case, and any custom SObject with an external ID field.

mcp:text-tool-response-content.text: Error upserting Salesforce record. Please check the external ID field and values.

ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- { objectname : payload.objectname, operation : "upsert", externalidfieldname: payload.externalidfieldname }
